title: Claire Falkenstein oral history transcript
creator: Falkenstein, Claire, 1908- interviewee
Rogers, Marjorie, interviewer
University of California, Los Angeles. Oral History Program
description: Transcript of a 13.5-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program
Falkenstein discusses her early years and development as a sculptor, her designs for various commissions, including St. Basil's, and the Los Angeles, San Francisco and European art scenes
The Bancroft Library, University of California, Berkeley

The UCLA Oral History Program : catalog of the collection / compiled by Constance S. Bullock (Los Angeles : Oral History Program, University of Los Angeles, 1982) is available in the UCLA Dept. of Special Collections
